description_long: This is a dark, metallic cup with a polygonal, slightly tapered cylindrical body and a sturdy, angular handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features a raised, wire-like emblem resembling a stylized triquetra or Celtic knot, giving it a distinctive and somewhat medieval appearance. The base is octagonal and slightly flared, providing stability and a decorative touch. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the metallic material. The cup appears solid and robust, suitable for holding beverages in urban or themed environments. There are no visible lids or internal divisions, and the interior is likely hollow to function as a drinking vessel.
description: A dark metallic cup with an angular handle and a raised triquetra emblem on the front, featuring a glossy, smooth finish and a flared octagonal base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the raised triquetra emblem and the angular handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle edge-on and the emblem partially visible, highlighting the cup's tapered cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the cup and the full angular handle on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle or emblem visible, showing the smooth, uninterrupted surface.
